steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Data Analysis question. The task is to find the occupational field with the highest incorporated self-employment rate from the table. Scan only the “Incorporated self-employment rate” column and pick the largest value.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — “sales and related occupations”: The table shows a 5.8% incorporated self-employment rate for this field — not the highest. ✗
  • Choice B — “installation, maintenance, and repair occupations”: The table shows 2.7% for this field — the lowest of the four, not the highest. ✗
  • Choice C — “construction and resource extraction occupations”: The table shows 4.4% for this field — below both sales and management fields. ✗
  • Choice D — “management, business, and financial services occupations”: The table shows 8.9% for this field — higher than all other fields listed. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
